title: xerochloa laniflora
intro: Xerochloa laniflora, also known as the hairy grass or woolly grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Xerochloa laniflora are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Xerochloa laniflora include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
